memberdef.definition: using MR::RibbonMenu::TabChangedSignal = boost::signals2::signal<void( int prevTabId, int newTabId )>
memberdef.name: TabChangedSignal

briefdescription.para: this signal is called when active tab changes
how long blocking window will blink in seconds
current scroll position of tabs panel
seconds to stay opened if not pinned

detaileddescription.para: adds a custom checkBox to the context menu it is applied to the selected objects

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the viewer is initialized (no mesh will be loaded at this stage)
This function is called before shutdown.
open Toolbar Customize modal popup
set top panel pinned and unpinned
this functions allow you to get top panel height (before scaling)

detaileddescription.para: set maximum wait time (in seconds) before top panel is closed after mouse leaves it (only when not pinned) minimum value is 0 seconds, panel will close immediately after mouse leaves it

briefdescription.para: set quick access menu item list version
read quick access menu items list from json
reset quick access menu items list to default
get Scene List window size
set Scene List window size
returns true if any blocking plugin is now active
returns true if any plugin is now active
updates status of item if it was changed outside of menu
returns index of active tab in RibbonSchemaHolder::schema().tabsOrder
get access to Ribbon font manager
get access to Ribbon button drawer
get access to Ribbon Toolbar
get access to Ribbon notifier
set active plugins list showed

detaileddescription.para: adds new notification to notifier list draws it first

briefdescription.para: returns flag defining if closing plugin on opening another one is enabled
sets flag defining if closing plugin on opening another one is enabled or not
returns current menu ui configuration (find more in RibbonMenuUIConfig comments)
======== selected objects options drawing
returns RibonMenu from ViewerInstance()
clones given objects with sub-objects (except for ancillary and unrecognized children) and undo
clones selected part of given object as separate object (faces, points)
draw single item

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::string > &group, int setFrontIndex, int setLength, bool withText)
memberdef.name: drawSmallButtonsSet_

briefdescription.para: draw set of small text buttons

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::string > &groupsInTab, const std::string &tabName, bool centerItems)
memberdef.name: setupItemsGroupConfig_

briefdescription.para: draw group of items

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::string > &groupsInTab, const std::string &tabName, bool centerItems)
memberdef.name: setupItemsGroup_

detaileddescription.para: ribbon menu item pressed requiremetnsHint - text that is showed if tool is unavailable (if empty then tool is available) returns true if item was actually activated or deactivated with press action

briefdescription.para: returns requirements line for given tool, empty line means that tool is available
Scene events.
Draw ribbon top panel.
Draw scene list window with content.

detaileddescription.para: Draw vertical line at the right border of scene to enable resize of scene list returns size of scene window

briefdescription.para: Draw viewport id and projection type for all viewporrts.
override this to customize appearance of collapsing headers for transform block
A virtual function for drawing of the dialog with shortcuts. It can be overriden in the inherited classes.
reads files with panel description
override this to have custom UI in "Selection Properties" window (under "Draw Options")

detaileddescription.para: override this to customize appearance of collapsing headers

briefdescription.para: draw scene list buttons
updates viewport sizes with respect to ribbon top and left panels
need to be called if you override windows pipeline and use ActiveListPlugin
call this to draw RibbonNotifier with respect of scene size and ribbon top panel
this function changes internal sizes of topPanel when it is enabled or disabled
draw quick access bar at header level

detaileddescription.para:
this functions draws header helpers:
Active tools list
Search bar
Help button
Ribbon pin/unpin button returns width available for drawing tabs

briefdescription.para: helper list of active tools
header helper search bar at panel
header helper button to pin/unpin ribbon
header helper button link to help page
part of top panel

detaileddescription.para: Class to control and render ribbon-style menu stores menu items, menu structure is provided by menuItemsStructure.json file (parsed on init)

node.label: MR::MultiListener< MouseDownListener, MouseMoveListener, MouseUpListener, MouseScrollListener, CursorEntranceListener, CharPressedListener, KeyDownListener, KeyUpListener, KeyRepeatListener, SpaceMouseMoveListener, SpaceMouseDownListener, TouchpadRotateGestureBeginListener, TouchpadRotateGestureUpdateListener, TouchpadRotateGestureEndListener, TouchpadSwipeGestureBeginListener, TouchpadSwipeGestureUpdateListener, TouchpadSwipeGestureEndListener, TouchpadZoomGestureBeginListener, TouchpadZoomGestureUpdateListener, TouchpadZoomGestureEndListener, PostResizeListener, PostRescaleListener, PostFocusListener >

MR::MultiListener< MouseDownListener, MouseMoveListener, MouseUpListener, MouseScrollListener, CursorEntranceListener, CharPressedListener, KeyDownListener, KeyUpListener, KeyRepeatListener, SpaceMouseMoveListener, SpaceMouseDownListener, TouchpadRotateGestureBeginListener, TouchpadRotateGestureUpdateListener, TouchpadRotateGestureEndListener, TouchpadSwipeGestureBeginListener, TouchpadSwipeGestureUpdateListener, TouchpadSwipeGestureEndListener, TouchpadZoomGestureBeginListener, TouchpadZoomGestureUpdateListener, TouchpadZoomGestureEndListener, PostResizeListener, PostRescaleListener, PostFocusListener >
